name: 20"x20" 23" Floral Print Outdoor 1pc Chair Cushion - Room Essentials™
description:
Add lively aesthetics to any chair with this 1-Piece Floral Print Outdoor Chair Cushion from Room Essentials™. Made of 100% recycled polyester with foam filling for plush comfort, this chair cushion features floral print for a cheerful vibe. The sewn-seam closure with knife edges and round corners lend a sleek look, while the side ties allow easy attachment. Plus, this water-repellant cushion is resistant to weather and UV rays, making it a perfect choice for patio or garden chairs.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
